reviews.review_description: This game is the perfect balance between smooth gun play and movement. Hand/controller based movement in VR just WORKS this has been proven by Gorilla tag’s success and many others. The utilization of guns with this amazing movement is smooth and mostly clean of all bugs. The Lazarus feels snappy and fast, the action doesn’t stop and when multiple teams are formed it’s just straight exhilarating. I feel this game is perfect and i haven’t even scratched the surface. Lazarus is very underrated and believe it has a strong and popular life ahead. Get on with some friends and just enjoy an amazing time (:

This is probably one of the best free vr games ever the guns are cool the single player is awesome and I love playing with my friends also the movements great and the guns are smooth great game keep up the good work
